prd.name: Single-Step CLI Install
prd.overview: The `prd` CLI should install in one step. After a single install command, every subcommand the tool advertises — including `prd dashboard` — must work without follow-up installs, reinstalls, or extra flags. Users should not have to know which features need which extras, and should never hit a "dependencies not installed" error from a subcommand that `prd --help` lists.

requirement.name: One-command install
requirement.description: Installing the CLI from its canonical source makes all advertised subcommands runnable.
requirement.rule: A first-time user can install `prd` with one command from the README and run every subcommand listed in `prd --help` without any further install step.
The documented install command does not require the user to name optional extras or feature groups.
Immediately after the documented install, `prd dashboard` starts the server successfully; it never prints a "dependencies not installed" message.

requirement.name: No reinstall to unlock features
requirement.description: Once installed, the tool never asks the user to reinstall or pass `--with`/`--reinstall` to gain access to a subcommand it already exposes.
requirement.rule: No error or help output from any subcommand instructs the user to run a second install, reinstall, or pip/uv command to unlock that subcommand.
Upgrading the tool with the standard upgrade command keeps every previously available subcommand working without re-specifying extras.

requirement.name: Discoverability matches capability
requirement.description: What `prd --help` advertises is what a freshly installed `prd` can do.
requirement.rule: Every subcommand shown in `prd --help` runs end-to-end on a fresh install without an "install extras" error path.
The README's install section shows exactly one install command for the CLI, with no conditional second command for optional features.

requirement.name: Skill and docs alignment
requirement.description: External-facing docs reflect the single-install model.
requirement.rule: The `prd` skill's Prerequisite section lists a single install command and does not mention extras, reinstall, or recovery commands for missing optional dependencies.
The README does not contain a "if you already installed without the extra, reinstall with…" recovery block.
